title: Te pido un taxi
overview: Rodrigo is quite sure about his ability to seduce all women, and he never stays with anyone. Love doesn’t exist to him. In this, his game, he has faced some diffcult catches, but not impossible ones. Now he will meet Sol, and she will break all the rules that he has made up.
